breakingChangesNotes:
+
  • Outputs in playbooks have been changed to return the raw response for the following commands: ctix-get-saved-searches, ctix-get-server-collections, ctix-get-actions, ctix-search-for-tag, ctix-get-indicator-relations, ctix-get-indicator-observations, ctix-get-conversion-feed-source, ctix-get-all-notes, ctix-saved-result-set, ctix-get-tags, and ctix-get-whitelist-iocs. Playbooks that depend on the previous outputs may need to be updated to use the raw response fields.
    • +
  • The above commands have been renamed to include the ctix- prefix. For example, the saved_result_set command is now ctix-saved-result-set. Update any Playbooks, Scripts, or Automations that call the old command names.
    • +
Make sure to check and update any Playbooks/Scripts/Automations that use the affected commands or rely on the previous output formats.
